assertion_results.text: Data extraction identifies the ecosystem as RPM based on the library name (openssl-libs) and component context, not Cargo (Step 1 Ecosystem detection — read ecosystems from Ecosystem Mappings config)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 10: "Ecosystem: **RPM** (NOT Cargo) -- detected from the library name openssl-libs being a system RPM package. The Ecosystem Mappings in security-matrix.md shows RPM ecosystem with rpms.lock.yaml as the lock file." Explicitly says RPM, explicitly says NOT Cargo, and references rpms.lock.yaml.

assertion_results.text: Version impact table includes ALL versions from the 2.2.x stream supportability matrix (2.2.0 through 2.2.4) and uses rpms.lock.yaml data for version extraction (Step 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md contains all 5 versions in the table: 2.2.0 (line 9), 2.2.1 (line 10), 2.2.2 (line 11), 2.2.3 (line 12), 2.2.4 (line 13). Line 3 states: "All versions are analyzed using rpms.lock.yaml data at pinned commits."

assertion_results.text: Dependency chain context classifies the package origin as explicit install because openssl-libs is present in rpms.lock.yaml, not inherited from the base image (Step 2.3.5)
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md lines 17-19: "openssl-libs is a system-level RPM package present in rpms.lock.yaml" and "Since it appears in the lock file, this is an **explicit install** (or explicit lock pin), not inherited solely from the base image" and "Origin: rpms.lock.yaml (explicit package pin)". Clearly says 'explicit install' and notes presence in rpms.lock.yaml.

assertion_results.text: Remediation creates a single task for the Konflux release repo — not the two-task upstream backport + downstream propagation flow used for source dependency ecosystems (Step 7 Remediation Task Creation — system package path)
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md line 3: "Ecosystem: RPM (system package) -- only one remediation task is needed. No upstream backport task required since the fix is an RPM update in the Konflux release repo." Only one task is defined ("Task: RPM Update (2.2.x stream)" on line 7), and only one jira.create_issue call is proposed (lines 18-25). Explicitly mentions RPM = system package = single task.

assertion_results.text: Remediation task description follows task-description-template.md format with Repository, Target Branch, Description, Implementation Notes, and Acceptance Criteria sections — Files to Modify is intentionally omitted per remediation-templates.md (Step 7 Remediation Task Creation)
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md lines 9-13 contain all required sections: "Repository: rhtpa-release.0.4.z" (line 9), "Target Branch: main" (line 10), "Description: Remediate CVE-2026-40215..." (line 11), "Implementation Notes: update the package version..." (line 12), "Acceptance Criteria: openssl-libs >= 3.0.7-28.el9_4..." (line 13). There is no "Files to Modify" section anywhere in the file, which is correct per the assertion.
